hero.title: Nathan Villette
hero.subtitle: Aspiring Data Engineer
hero.description: A future data engineer specializing in data management and operations. I design robust ETL pipelines and storage architectures to transform data streams into business intelligence solutions.
hero.personalInfo: In my free time, I enjoy working on personal projects and staying active through sports, specifically volleyball, running, and climbing.

experience.description: A 16-month progressive career path transitioning from software development (tool creation and maintenance) to data engineering: designing ETL pipelines, performing statistical analysis, and deploying BI solutions using Power BI.

experience.role: Bachelor University of Technology (BUT) in Computer Science
experience.description: Specialization: Data Administration, Management, and Exploitation

experience.company: Lycée Maurice Rondeau - Bussy Saint Georges (77)

projects.title: Speedflag
projects.description: A flag-guessing game where you have 30 seconds to identify as many flags as possible. Built for technical challenge and competitive play with a global leaderboard and login system.

projects.title: Gaming Analytics
projects.description: An ETL pipeline designed to extract, transform, and load data from Steam and Twitch to analyze gaming market trends.
